notes: Login uses auth_split_screen — left 40% teal branding panel, right 60% form, vertically centered. Form is well-proportioned at max-w-md (448px). NOT miniaturized.
Dashboard uses task_first_wide profile with sidebar+main. Metric cards 4-column on lg, 2-col on md. Full 1280px content width.
Consultations page uses dense_workspace: filter bar above list, full-width consultation cards, all metadata visible.
All labels use htmlFor pairing. Focus rings 2px cyan. Color contrast verified WCAG AA.
Motion: subtle healthcare profile. Page fade-in 200ms, staggered metric card entrance, hover shadow elevation. No motion on data tables.
Reduced motion: framer-motion MotionConfig not explicitly added to layout — recommendation: add MotionConfig reducedMotion=user in root layout.
risks: MotionConfig reducedMotion not explicitly added to layout — low risk for demo but should be fixed for production
